CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 216 

ORGANIZATION_MARKETING_NAME 

LABEL: Part D Plan Organization Marketing Name 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the name of the Part D plan sponsor's marketing name for the organization. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: ORGANIZATION_MARKETING_NAME 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 150 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: text description
